user_message: Summarize what happened with Adatum Corporation and give me the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 15:10 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation deployment blockers

Our team encountered some challenges with deployment blockers. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 09:53 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for deployment blockers. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 14:54 EST
Subject: Re: deployment blockers Discussion - Next Steps

There's been a change in our timeline for deployment blockers. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-03-13
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), David (Adatum Corporation)

[00:02:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on deployment blockers from our last session.

[00:06:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:12:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:14:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for integration complexity is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:17:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:22:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Adatum Corporation: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Stakeholder Map Generation template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
